summary: Iteration 82: Tested Instagram/TikTok social username fields and comment Enter key prevention. Backend: PUT/GET /api/auth/me correctly accepts and returns instagram_username and tiktok_username fields. Frontend: Settings page has working Instagram and TikTok input fields (data-testid='settings-instagram' and 'settings-tiktok'), Save Changes button persists values. Profile page displays social links with icons (data-testid='profile-instagram-link' and 'profile-tiktok-link') with correct URLs. Comment input on HivePage correctly prevents form submission on Enter key press while Submit button still works.
